mapper.select: SELECT p.PAY_YM , p.EMP_NO , p.SUPPLY_01, p.SUPPLY_02, p.SUPPLY_03, p.SUPPLY_04, p.SUPPLY_05 , p.SUPPLY_06, p.SUPPLY_07, p.SUPPLY_08, p.SUPPLY_09, p.SUPPLY_10 , p.SUPPLY_11, p.SUPPLY_12, p.SUPPLY_13, p.SUPPLY_14, p.SUPPLY_15 , p.SUPPLY_16, p.SUPPLY_17, p.SUPPLY_18, p.SUPPLY_19, p.SUPPLY_20 , p.SUPPLY_21, p.SUPPLY_22, p.SUPPLY_23, p.SUPPLY_24, p.SUPPLY_25 , p.SUPPLY_26, p.SUPPLY_27, p.SUPPLY_28, p.SUPPLY_29, p.SUPPLY_30 , p.SUPPLY_31, p.SUPPLY_32, p.SUPPLY_33, p.SUPPLY_34, p.SUPPLY_35 , p.SUPPLY_36, p.SUPPLY_37, p.SUPPLY_38, p.SUPPLY_39, p.SUPPLY_40 , p.SUPPLY_41, p.SUPPLY_42, p.SUPPLY_43, p.SUPPLY_44, p.SUPPLY_45 , p.SUPPLY_46, p.SUPPLY_47, p.SUPPLY_48, p.SUPPLY_49, p.SUPPLY_50 , p.SUPPLY_51, p.SUPPLY_52, p.SUPPLY_53, p.SUPPLY_54, p.SUPPLY_55 , p.PAY_AMT , p.DEDUCT_01, p.DEDUCT_02, p.DEDUCT_03, p.DEDUCT_04, p.DEDUCT_05 , p.DEDUCT_06, p.DEDUCT_07, p.DEDUCT_08, p.DEDUCT_09, p.DEDUCT_10 , p.DEDUCT_11, p.DEDUCT_12, p.DEDUCT_13, p.DEDUCT_14, p.DEDUCT_15 , p.DEDUCT_16, p.DEDUCT_17, p.DEDUCT_18, p.DEDUCT_19, p.DEDUCT_20 , p.DEDUCT_21, p.DEDUCT_22, p.DEDUCT_23, p.DEDUCT_24, p.DEDUCT_25 , p.DEDUCT_26, p.DEDUCT_27, p.DEDUCT_28 , p.DEDUCT_AMT , p.WORK_CNT , CASE WHEN m.MLINE = '09' THEN m.MLINE_CNT ELSE m.AM END AS WORK_AM_CNT , CASE WHEN m.MLINE = '05' OR m.MLINE = '13' THEN m.MLINE_CNT ELSE m.PM END AS WORK_PM_CNT , p.EXTEN_CNT , p.MIDNT_CNT , p.HOLI_CNT , p.TIME_PAY , p.WORK_TIME_CNT , p.HOLI_AM_DAY , p.HOLI_PM_DAY FROM C_PAYLIST p LEFT JOIN C_MKEUN m ON p.EMP_NO = m.EMP_NO AND p.PAY_YM = m.YYMM WHERE p.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND p.SALARYTYPE_CD = '100' ORDER BY p.PAY_YM DESC
